title: Debt Schema
description: Accepted technical or governance debt entry (YELLOW debt).

severity.description: Debt can only be MEDIUM or LOW; BLOCKER/HIGH must be fixed

reason.description: Why this is deferred, not fixed

acceptedBy.description: Human or role who formally accepted this debt

target.description: What the resolution looks like when complete

expiry.description: Must be resolved by this date (max 30 days)

evidence.description: Evidence IDs for the original finding
